accommodation.title: Accommodation for concerts, sport and events in the UK | AJSEE
accommodation.description: Find accommodation in the United Kingdom when travelling for concerts, sport and other events. AJSEE connects you with TrustedStays; booking is completed with the partner.
accommodation.ogTitle: Accommodation for concerts, sport and events in the UK | AJSEE
accommodation.ogDescription: Travelling to the UK for a concert, sporting event or live experience? AJSEE connects you with TrustedStays, where enquiries, bookings and confirmations take place.

hero.title: UK accommodation for experience-led travel
hero.lead: Travelling to the United Kingdom for a concert, sporting event or other live experience? AJSEE connects you with TrustedStays, where you can complete your enquiry or booking directly with the partner.
hero.micro: Official partnership • Currently UK • Enquiries, bookings and confirmations happen on TrustedStays

partner.label: AJSEE’s official accommodation partner
partner.scope: Note: This page currently features accommodation in the United Kingdom only.

trustedstays.title: TrustedStays at a glance
trustedstays.lead: TrustedStays offers accredited, professionally managed and secure accommodation across the United Kingdom — suitable for corporate travel, longer stays and selected event-led trips.

points.1: Currently focused on the United Kingdom
points.2: Accredited accommodation with a focus on standards, safety and professional management
points.3: Suitable for short and extended stays — from a few nights to several months

trustedstays.scope: Enquiries or bookings, payment and confirmation are completed directly on TrustedStays.

support.title: Local AJSEE support
support.text: Not sure about the steps or ran into a problem? Message us — we can help you navigate the enquiry or booking process in your language.
support.textMobile: Need help with an enquiry or booking? Message us — we’ll help you navigate the process.

1.title: Open the listings
1.text: Click the button to open TrustedStays. The page will open in a new tab.

2.title: Choose destination and dates
2.text: Search accommodation in the United Kingdom by city, dates, number of guests and type of stay.

3.title: Enquire or book direct
3.text: Complete your enquiry or booking directly on TrustedStays. Payment, confirmation and further communication are handled by the partner.

q1.a: No. AJSEE connects you with TrustedStays, but your enquiry or booking is completed directly on their website.

q2.q: Is the link a partner link?
q2.a: Yes. We use a referral link to TrustedStays to measure referred visits. If a commission is generated, it should not affect the price you pay.

q3.q: Can you help if I get stuck?
q3.a: Yes. Message us and we can help you navigate the process or communication in your language.

q4.q: Who handles cancellations or booking changes?
q4.a: Cancellations, booking changes, payments and confirmations are handled by TrustedStays under their own terms. AJSEE can help you navigate the process and communication.

accommodation.disclaimer: AJSEE is not an accommodation provider, travel agency or payment processor. Enquiries, bookings, payments, confirmations and stay conditions are handled by TrustedStays.

final.title: Ready? Choose your UK accommodation.
final.text: TrustedStays opens in a new tab, where you can complete your enquiry or booking directly with the partner.
